failure.message: MORI+AITER bridge currently requires the EP mesh to cover the whole process group, matching the 4x/8x MI350 canary shapes.

root_cause: The MORI+AITER bridge initialized MORI SHMEM from the global default process group and explicitly rejected EP submeshes. That allowed 4x/EP4 and 8x/EP8, but blocked the requested 8x/FSDP8/EP4 target shape.

patch_direction.change: Register and initialize MORI SHMEM from the current rank's EP process group under a stable local name, thread that EP group into all MORI op constructors, and remove the global-world-size guard.
patch_direction.reference: sources/references/mori/docs/MORI-EP-GUIDE.md documents that MORI SHMEM must initialize from a registered PyTorch process group name before creating EpDispatchCombineOp.

decision: Do not treat this as performance evidence. Retry the same 8x/FSDP8/EP4 shape after the MORI EP-subgroup bridge patch passes syntax and source-stamp checks.
